prompt:

She wears a tailored black blazer over a crisp white dress shirt with a loosely tied red-and-black striped necktie. Solid deep red seamless background, creating a bold editorial contrast. Soft beauty lighting with a large octabox positioned slightly above eye level, gentle fill light, smooth skin texture, catchlights in the eyes, high dynamic range, razor-sharp facial details. Luxury magazine cover aesthetic, Korean fashion editorial style, premium beauty campaign photography, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, f/2.0, ISO 100, ultra-detailed hair strands, cinematic color grading, natural skin tones, professional retouching, photorealistic, 8K resolution, symmetrical framing, chest-up portrait, minimalistic composition.
